result.finding: literature_params.koc (Higgins-Luthy +0.55/CF2 QSPR): Koc(PFBA C4)=2.15 vs Koc(PFDoDA C12)=53985 L/kg => 4.40 log10 spread (~25119x). Soil retardation R=1+rho*Kd/theta is therefore strongly congener-dependent; one constant Cwo cannot represent all congeners (CLAUDE.md: short chains leach, long chains buffer).
